findings.performance_gap_explanation: The claimed 1,341 tok/s in documentation was measured under specific conditions: 50 concurrent workers with sustained generation. Real-world single/parallel 8-16 requests achieve 400-1000 tok/s depending on batch size.
key_insights: 0.5B model achieves ~470 tok/s single, ~1000 tok/s parallel 25
7B model achieves ~121 tok/s single, ~301 tok/s parallel 8
Continuous batching (-cb) essential for parallel throughput
KV cache quantization (-ctk q4_0 -ctv q4_0) enables larger context

discrepancy_notes.claimed_1341_tok_s: Achieved with 50 parallel workers and long generation (200+ tokens). Real-world typical usage (1-25 parallel) achieves 400-1000 tok/s.
discrepancy_notes.documentation_vs_reality: Documentation assumed optimized build with all flags. Actual results vary based on exact server configuration and warmup state.
